images.name: cover
images.prompt: A premium enterprise exhibition hall interior with a strong central brand anchor, giant immersive display walls, a star-like ceiling lighting array, and a refined futuristic atmosphere that communicates scale, trust, and technological maturity. Style: realistic enterprise interior photography, premium B2B case study visual, Tencent-like blue tone, symmetrical composition, cinematic but credible, immersive lighting, high-end technology showroom, polished architectural photography. Focus: Establish brand trust, enterprise scale, and case-study credibility. Negative prompt: cartoon, fantasy, cyberpunk nightclub, exaggerated neon overload, distorted perspective, deformed architecture, low resolution, blurry logo area, cluttered foreground, gimmicky sci-fi props, people blocking the main scene, excessive text overlay, poster design style.

images.name: entry-point
images.prompt: A high-tech exhibition hall entry area centered around a unified interactive installation, with radiating light elements, spatial depth, and a welcoming intelligent interface presence that signals the beginning of a connected visitor journey. Style: real-world exhibition photography, immersive but restrained technology aesthetic, clean spatial storytelling, enterprise innovation center, blue-green controlled lighting, wide-angle interior shot, premium corporate environment. Focus: Unified interaction entry point. Negative prompt: consumer electronics store, gaming arcade, overly playful colors, cartoon mascot emphasis, chaotic signage, distorted walls, low-detail lighting, fantasy portal effects, cheap event booth look, crowd clutter, excessive saturation.

images.name: interaction-journey
images.prompt: A sleek exhibition corridor with multiple digital display points integrated along the visitor path, expressing a natural and continuous interaction journey where enterprise content unfolds fluidly through space. Style: architectural interior photography, understated futuristic corporate lighting, clean lines, guided visitor flow, immersive enterprise showroom, realistic environment, blue-purple accent lighting, professional case-study documentation. Focus: Natural multimodal interaction embedded in visitor flow. Negative prompt: empty retail mall, hospital corridor, messy reflections, warped screens, low-end trade show booth, heavy fog, dramatic cinematic characters, fantasy holograms everywhere, motion blur, noisy image, tacky sci-fi effects.

images.name: scalable-space
images.prompt: A complete intelligent exhibition environment with integrated brand wall, large multimedia displays, reflective flooring, and spatial continuity, conveying a system that can keep evolving with future content and enterprise narratives. Style: premium corporate showroom photography, realistic exhibition environment, long-form B2B storytelling visual, elegant blue lighting, spacious composition, controlled reflections, enterprise-grade architectural image. Focus: Long-term operational scalability and continuous content evolution. Negative prompt: empty luxury hallway only, hotel lobby feel, nightclub ambience, over-stylized reflections, distorted branding, low-detail screens, exaggerated CGI, chaotic composition, consumer ad look, oversharpened image, posterized lighting.
